params.id: The ID to reserve (will be normalized).
params.to: The address to assign it to.

returns._0: The registered ID or empty string.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.id: The ID to resolve (case-insensitive due to normalization).

returns._0: The owner address or zero address.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

adminReserve(string,address).notice: Reserve an ID on behalf of an address (admin-only).

getId(address).notice: Get the FlashID (string) for a given address, or "" if not registered.

idHashOf(address).notice: Get the idHash registered for an address (for debugging/indexers).

isRegistered(address).notice: Check if an address is registered.

isTaken(string).notice: Check if an ID is taken.

ownerOfHash(bytes32).notice: Get the owner of a specific idHash.

registerId(string).notice: Register a new FlashID for your account.

resolveAddress(string).notice: Resolve the address for a given ID, or address(0) if not found.

updateId(string).notice: Update your FlashID to a new name.
